channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: In Musk v. Altman trial, the entire AI industry lost
item.description: The biggest tech trial of the AI era ended anticlimactically on procedural grounds, revealing a sector consumed by power struggles.

item.title: Congress scrambles to regulate prediction markets
item.description: Lawmakers are rushing to set new rules for online prediction markets after several insider trading allegations.

item.title: Trump's revenge tour targets Massie
item.description: The Kentucky primary tests whether Trump's influence over Republicans remains strong amid war and inflation.

item.title: Axios Harris Poll 100: GOP embraces AI over Democrats
item.description: Democrats have grown more skeptical of AI, while Republicans show increasing support for the technology.
